title: Autism
description:
A Simple mod that adds in Silly autism items

Version 1 of this mod currently only includes a Tbh Creature that, upon right click, will make the yippiee sound!
body:
A Simple mod that adds in Silly autism items

Version 1 of this mod currently only includes a Tbh Creature that, upon right click, will make the yippiee sound!

If you have any questions or ideas, feel free to reach out to me on Twitter at @LifelineUwU!
